description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and define variables CONTAINER_REPO, CONTAINER_BASE_IMAGE, CONTAINER_BUNDLE_IMAGE, DOCKER_DRIVER, GCP_CREDENTIALS, GKE_IMAGE. Set three stages: build, test, deploy. In the build stage add a build job (runs on all branches except production) that uses the before_script to docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CONTAINER_REPO, then executes docker build --pull --file deploy/docker/Dockerfile_Base -t $CONTAINER_BASE_IMAGE . && docker push $CONTAINER_BASE_IMAGE, followed by docker build --pull --file deploy/docker/Dockerfile_Bundler -t $CONTAINER_BUNDLE_IMAGE . && docker push $CONTAINER_BUNDLE_IMAGE. In the test stage add three jobs: rails_best_practices (allow_failure, except production) runs docker pull $CONTAINER_BUNDLE_IMAGE and docker run --rm $CONTAINER_BUNDLE_IMAGE rails_best_practices .; rspec (except production) runs docker pull $CONTAINER_BUNDLE_IMAGE and docker run --rm $CONTAINER_BUNDLE_IMAGE rspec --profile; rubocop (allow_failure, except production) runs docker pull $CONTAINER_BUNDLE_IMAGE and docker run --rm $CONTAINER_BUNDLE_IMAGE rubocop. In the deploy stage add a deploy job (only on production) that sets environment name production with URL https://benicky.io, writes $RAILS_MASTER_KEY to config/master.key, writes $GCP_CREDENTIALS_JSON to $GCP_CREDENTIALS, runs bin/gcp_install.sh, adds ./google-cloud-sdk/bin to PATH, then runs bin/gcp_setup.sh, bin/docker_build.sh, and bin/gke_set_image.sh.
